description: Bootstrap an author/book-led GitHub Pages hub for the AI Syncclub webinar, publish the updated webinar deck, provide participant tip packs and examples, add reusable Codex skills, and configure automatic deployment from main.

userStories.title: Bootstrap static site and publish webinar deck
userStories.description: As a webinar visitor, I want a polished landing page and a working webinar page so that I can access the updated slides and core resources immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: A root landing page exists with links to webinar, tips, examples, downloads, and skills
The updated webinar HTML is published at webinar/index.html
Shared styling and basic site structure exist
python3 scripts/validate_site.py --phase bootstrap passes

userStories.title: Add GitHub Pages auto deployment
userStories.description: As the repo owner, I want GitHub Pages to deploy automatically from main so that merged updates are published without manual steps.
acceptanceCriteria: A GitHub Actions workflow exists under .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml
The workflow uses configure-pages, upload-pages-artifact, and deploy-pages official actions
The workflow triggers on pushes to main
python3 scripts/validate_site.py --phase deploy passes

userStories.title: Create participant tip pack and downloads
userStories.description: As a webinar participant, I want ready-to-use markdown guides and templates so that I can move from the webinar to action right away.
acceptanceCriteria: Participant cheat sheet, PRD template, Stitch prompt pack, next steps, update summary, FAQ, and promo copy markdown files exist
tips/index.html links to each download resource
The copy is Korean-first and practical
python3 scripts/validate_site.py --phase content passes

userStories.title: Build a large examples catalog
userStories.description: As a participant, I want many concrete PRD and Stitch examples so that I can adapt them to my own service ideas.
acceptanceCriteria: examples/index.html exists with at least 24 example cards
Examples cover personal services, internal tools, education/content, PRD samples, Stitch prompts, and Q&A responses
Each example includes problem, PRD draft, Stitch prompt, and extension point
python3 scripts/validate_site.py --phase examples passes

userStories.title: Ship installable Codex skills
userStories.description: As an advanced participant, I want installable skills and matching docs so that I can reuse the webinar workflows inside Codex.
acceptanceCriteria: Four skills exist with SKILL.md and agents/openai.yaml
Skills cover service idea PRD, Stitch prompt crafting, webinar follow-up, and promo copy generation
Each skill has example references where needed
python3 scripts/validate_site.py --phase skills passes

userStories.title: Finalize navigation and repo documentation
userStories.description: As a repo visitor, I want clean navigation and a README so that I understand what the project contains and how to use it.
acceptanceCriteria: README explains the project, local preview, Pages deploy, and where each resource lives
Internal navigation between landing, webinar, tips, examples, downloads, and skills works
The hub presents a book/author-led framing with participant resources underneath
python3 scripts/validate_site.py --phase full passes
